title: Youtube Poop: Heavy Metal has Eight Fantastic Sides
description: Wow, a video by me that lasts more than two minutes. This is a Brutal Legend Youtube Poop that I started working on after a sudden burst of inspiration that didn't last long. I was going to poop the entire game but I ran out of steam or the other cutscenes weren't as editable or something. Either way I wanted to edit this since it came out so enjoy.
